cpu: AMD A8-3850 APU with Radeon HD Graphics
notes: UE4 based game with no 'real' fullscreen. Has no resolution options: only 'fullscreen' vs 'windowed' - does not go proper fullscreen on my HDMI 1080p single monitor setting. Runs perfectly fine in windowed mode (recognizes alt-enter for switching). Proton/WINE launch config options do not solve the issue. [Too bad, since this game tries to mimick old CRT Monitor distortion effects, which - in windowed mode - beat the immersion]
title: MONITOR: The Game
